metadata.name: Manage CRM and Sphere of Influence (SOI)

description: An agent wants to systematically market to their past clients and personal contacts (their SOI).

nodes.task_description: Segment the contacts in the CRM database into categories (e.g., past clients, hot leads, cold leads, personal friends).

expected_outcome.expected: The CRM is organized for targeted marketing.

nodes.task_description: Set up all contacts on a monthly email newsletter with market updates and home tips.

expected_outcome.expected: A monthly newsletter campaign is launched.

nodes.task_description: Create a task to call everyone in the 'past client' category quarterly to check in and ask for referrals.

expected_outcome.expected: A systematic calling plan is implemented in the CRM.
